title: chassalia hiernii var. hiernii
intro: Chassalia hiernii var. hiernii, also known as the East African Chassalia, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Chassalia hiernii var. hiernii include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Chassalia hiernii var. hiernii is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used in traditional medicine as a poultice or topical application.
